purpose: Surface a session-scoped isFreshIdentity boolean on NostrIdentityContext, derived from whether loadStoredIdentity() returned null at this page load's init, before the existing auto-generation step. No new persistence; no page wiring (consumed by S3/S4).

public_api.name: deriveIsFreshIdentity
public_api.description: Pure function. Returns true iff storedIdentityAtInit is null, i.e. no identity existed in storage at this init. Exported from app/src/lib/freshIdentity.ts so it is unit-testable without jsdom. Consumed by NostrIdentityContext.tsx's init() effect, called on the pre-auto-generation loadStoredIdentity() result.

public_api.name: useNostrIdentity().isFreshIdentity
public_api.description: New field added to NostrIdentityContextValue (and its type). true only when deriveIsFreshIdentity(loadStoredIdentity()) was true at this session's init; false whenever a stored identity already existed at init, including immediately after a first-timer's auto-generated identity was saved and the page is reloaded. Session-scoped: set once during the init effect, not re-derived on later state changes. Defaults to false in DEFAULT_CONTEXT (used outside the provider) and before hydration completes.

owned_data: session-scoped isFreshIdentity boolean (in-memory React state only; no new storage key)
dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/nostrKeys.ts (loadStoredIdentity, StoredNostrIdentity type — already an existing dependency of NostrIdentityContext.tsx)
dependencies_forbidden: any new persisted storage key (localStorage/idb) for the fresh-identity signal itself
test_targets: tests/unit/lib/freshIdentity.test.ts — deriveIsFreshIdentity: null-at-init -> true (AC-DETECT-1); non-null stored identity at init -> false, incl. the 'created this session then reloaded' case (AC-DETECT-2)
